summary: Iteration 20: Image CDN Architecture & Variant Testing Complete. 27/27 backend tests pass. Verified image variant generation (AVIF/WebP/JPG × 4 sizes), list view images_variants field (max 4 entries), Picture component integration, viewport meta (pinch-zoom enabled), i18n translations, and scroll lock during image reorder.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend image_variants.py service correctly generates 12 variants per image (AVIF/WebP/JPG × thumb/card/gallery/full)
Variant files are stored at /app/uploads/variants/<aa>/<bb>/<sha256>/<size>.<ext> with content-addressed SHA256 naming
GET /api/auctions?view=list correctly returns images_variants field capped at 4 entries via _list_shape()
GET /api/auctions/{id} returns full images_variants array (not sliced) when present in DB
Variant URLs are relative /api/uploads/variants/... when IMAGE_CDN_BASE is empty (correct for preview env)
Picture.jsx component correctly implements AVIF → WebP → JPG fallback chain with srcSet for retina
AuctionCard.jsx uses Picture component with horizontal swipe carousel (snap-x, overflow-x-auto)
AuctionCard.jsx has CtaSlide component with data-testid='auction-card-cta-slide' and view_full_auction translation
AuctionDetailPage.jsx uses Picture component for hero image and thumbnails
Viewport meta is 'width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover' - NO maximum-scale=1 or user-scalable=no (pinch-zoom enabled)
index.js has NO gesturestart blocker or double-tap-zoom watchdog
ImageUploader.jsx has scroll lock code: document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden' on drag start, restored to '' on drag end
.no-scrollbar CSS utility exists in index.css with scrollbar-width: none
i18n translations for view_full_auction: BG='Виж пълния търг', EN='View full auction', RO='Vezi licitația completă'
Legacy auctions (imported before variant generation) gracefully fall back to plain with images[] array
seed_data_creation: None - used existing auctions. Note: All 3 existing auctions are legacy (imported from mobile.bg before variant generation) so images_variants is empty. New auctions created via POST /api/auctions will have populated images_variants.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 validated the image CDN architecture. Key findings: (1) Backend image_variants.py service generates 12 variants per uploaded image. (2) Variant files exist on disk at /app/uploads/variants/ with proper SHA256-based directory structure. (3) GET /api/auctions?view=list returns images_variants capped at 4 entries. (4) Legacy auctions (imported from mobile.bg) have empty images_variants[] - this is expected as they were created before the feature. (5) Picture.jsx gracefully falls back to plain when no variant manifest is available. (6) Viewport meta allows pinch-zoom (no maximum-scale=1). (7) ImageUploader has scroll lock during drag. (8) All i18n translations for view_full_auction are correct. (9) No live auctions in preview DB - all 3 existing auctions are status=ended.

image_variant_generation.details: 12 variants per image (AVIF/WebP/JPG × thumb/card/gallery/full) stored at /app/uploads/variants/

list_view_images_variants.details: GET /api/auctions?view=list returns images_variants field capped at 4 entries

detail_view_images_variants.details: GET /api/auctions/{id} returns full images_variants when present (legacy auctions have empty array)

variant_url_format.details: URLs are relative /api/uploads/variants/... when IMAGE_CDN_BASE is empty

picture_component.details: Picture.jsx implements AVIF → WebP → JPG fallback with srcSet for retina

auction_card_swipe_carousel.details: AuctionCard.jsx has horizontal swipe carousel with snap-x, pagination dots, and CtaSlide

cta_slide.details: CtaSlide has data-testid='auction-card-cta-slide' with view_full_auction translation

pinch_zoom_enabled.details: Viewport meta has NO maximum-scale=1 or user-scalable=no

scroll_lock_during_reorder.details: ImageUploader.jsx sets body overflow=hidden on drag start, restores on drag end

i18n_translations.details: view_full_auction: BG='Виж пълния търг', EN='View full auction', RO='Vezi licitația completă'

legacy_auction_fallback.details: Auctions without images_variants gracefully fall back to plain with images[] array

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all tests use real endpoints. Stripe is in test mode.
